guide:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** William Corufost  
Speak to William Corufost. Purchase a beginner's drum from Merchant Dolson (downstairs in the same building as William Corufost). Return to William Corufost.  
**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** William Corufost  
Corufost sends you to speak with Spiritmaster Imaryn. To find her, go downstairs and exit the building to the west. The archway to the north leads to the Midroad. Follow the Midroad south to the end. Enter an archway to the west, and continue west to the west gate. Spiritmaster Imaryn is north of the west gate. You'll be bound and sent to Coachman Ronks (on the coast). Return to Corufost.  
**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
**Quest Area:** Freeport  
To prove your worth, Solenia wants you to kill dragonflies around the city. Exit the city through the west gate and kill damselflies/drakeflies until you get two damaged dragonfly wings. Return to Solenia Freyar.  
**6,900 XP** & **Chant of Battle** scroll

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Solenia will make you a better weapon if you bring her the following ingredients:

- **Iron ore + leather strip** — Merchant Shohan (in the Bazaar near the blacksmith)  
- **Beetle leg segment** — slay beetles in the field until you get it

Return to Solenia with the items.  
**17,000 XP** & **Traveler's Rapier**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Talk to Freyar, who tells you that bandits have been raiding caravans into the city. Their thefts of imported goods include food and supplies for the poor. Stop the Highwaymen and recover the stolen goods.

There are two camps for Highwaymen. Choose either.
1) Go out the exit by the Blacksmith (north), follow the road for a few minutes, then head off to the right and look for a grassy hill with a druid stone on top. You will find the Highwaymen here. 
2) Follow the mountain range next to Spiritmaster  Imaryn west until you see a small gathering of stones next to the mountain range in Freeport (SW).  

Once locating either camp, kill a Highwayman and loot their Stolen Goods. Return to Freyar for quest turn-in.  
**36,500 XP** & **Funeral March** scroll

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Talk to Freyar. Someone has placed a **Chichan Eel** in the waters that flow to Freeport. Find and kill the eel (**cons yellow @ 7**) and loot its venom sac.

**Note:** Go out the north exit, run north until you reach the river, and follow the river west from coast until you reach the second dam from the coast. You should see a small house where the Orc Ransacker spawns just at the edge of the water near the dam. The chichan eel spawns at the base of this dam. Kill, loot the venom sac, and return to Freyar.  
**157,474 XP**, **Artful Strike** scroll, & **Silken Leggings**

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Talk to Freyar. She sends you to **Guard Sareken**, located at the North Gate by the bank.

Guard Sareken needs **147 tunar** and **3 tough pike scales**. Pike can be found in the river north of Freeport in same stretch of river as the chichan eel from the Level 7 Quest. Go out the north exit, follow the river north to the dam, and farm large pike (**CON DB @ 10**) until you have the 3 scales.

Return to Sareken. He now wants the boots of an **Orc Ransacker** wandering in the old house north of Freeport (next the chichan eels and pikes). Go out the north exit and head north along the river until you see the small old shack. Kill the Orc Ransacker (**cons white @ 10**), loot his boots, and return to Guard Sareken.  
**556,753 XP** & **Sturdy Short Sword**

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Speak with Freyar. The **Shining Shield** has brought in an outsider named **Ilenar Crelwin**. Solenia arranges to hire you as an assistant to Ilenar while he's in town. Do whatever Ilenar asks and learn what you can about him.

Ilenar's robe was damaged in his journey to Freeport. Take his robe to **Delvin Stitchfinger** in **Bobble-by-Water** to fix it. Travel north along the river from Freeport to reach Bobble-by-Water. Delvin is in a building north from the coachman.

Delvin won’t complete the work until you help him. He sends you to buy **fine chocolates** from **Grocer Fritz Belgor**, who is in the same building. You need 120–250 tunar. Buy them and return to Delvin.

Delvin gives you back a **chocolate-stained robe**. Return to Ilenar, who is displeased. He gives you a **poisoned chocolate** to give to Delvin. Inform Solenia of Ilenar's plan. Solenia determines the chocolates are poisoned. After she fixes them, deliver them to Delvin. Delvin falls unconscious and appears dead. Return to Ilenar.  
**550,698 XP** & **Anthem of Light** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Ilenar Crelwin  
Talk to Ilenar Crelwin, who needs several items to complete his research.

- **Nightworm roots** — banned for poisonous properties. Contact **Dagget Klem** in Temby (bring 260 tunar).  Temby is the village  on the coast of Hodstock and Temby zone. 
- **Blood of a Madman** — travel south from Freeport to kill a Madman (**cons yellow @ 15**) near a spire on the coast. Loot his blood.

Return the items to Ilenar, then back to Solenia.  
**883,791 XP**, **Crashing Verses** scroll, & **Thespian Leggings**

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
**The Grimoire** — Report to Ilenar as an undercover agent. Your quest is to retrieve **Geldwin's Grimoire** from the library in the **Temple of Light**, west of Ilenar's location, but it will not be easy.

**Crim Arikson** — First you must visit a forger that Ilenar knows who will create a letter for you. Crim is at an inn in **Bastable Village** in the Bastable Village zone just outside of Highpass. He requires 525 tunar and a document with Sir Hanst's seal.

**Page Joseph Robert** — find the page traveling through Bastable, talk to him receive the his missive. Return to Crim and pay 525 tunar for the forged letter.

**Amulet of Deception** — Next you must collect from the remains of **Swiftwind Galeehart** on Hangman's Hill (just east of Bobble-by-Water coach on a hill directly outside of town). Kill the skeleton and loot the amulet. Return to Ilenar with the amulet and forged letter.

**The Library** — Travel to the **Temple of Light**, locate **Leandro Novan**, present the forged letter, follow him to the forbidden texts, and speak with **Praetor Gunner** to obtain **Geldwin's Grimoire**. Both of these NPC's can be found by staying to the right when you enter the Temple of Light built into the mountainside. 

**Conclusion** — Return the book to Solenia Freyar. She gives you a fake copy to deliver to Ilenar.  
**2,814,929 XP**

Choose between:
- **Power Dance** — a group spell that transfers some of your power to your group, increases Power per tic by 51, comes with a magic foil.  
- **Sweeping Combat** — a group spell that increases everyone’s combat effectiveness in battle, increases STR, STA, DEX, AGI by 45, comes with a magic sabre.
